flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at San Jose State University rose 91% between 2007 and 2010 ($5.5k → $10.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at San Jose State University rose 48% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.6k → $5.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at San Jose State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at San Jose State University rose 47% between 2021 and 2024 (25.2% → 37.0%).
